## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest -q`
- [ ] Lint passes: `ruff check .`
- [ ] Format clean: `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] Type check passes: `mypy src/` (Python 3.10+)
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] AC9 regression verified (if applicable)

## Breaking Changes
- [ ] Yes, this is a breaking change
- [ ] No, this is backward compatible
